title: Phase 3D: Admin - operational config and user preferences
description: Build operational configuration management page (status codes, reason codes, cutoff times, etc.) and user preferences page with API.
steps: Implement config sections: status codes, reason codes, cutoff times, delivery zones, truck types, material categories
Include preferences: theme, default branch, notification settings, table column defaults, dashboard layout
Create src/app/api/users/me/preferences/route.ts with GET and PUT endpoints
